_description: 9 Applied Value report sections — migrated from av_report_sections DB table. Source of truth for section definitions, keyword patterns, and category alignments.
_deprecation_note: The av_report_sections DB table is STILL ACTIVELY READ by api/index.ts (3 endpoints) and api/daily-scan.ts (section tagging). It holds section IDs referenced by the article_av_sections junction table. DO NOT DROP. This config file is the source of truth for scoring rules and keywords only.

sections.title: Introduction & Executive Summary
sections.description: High-level overview of market conditions, key themes, and report highlights.

sections.title: Market Scope
sections.description: Definition and sizing of the building materials & products market, including TAM, segments, and subsegments.

sections.title: Market Context & Outlook
sections.description: Current macroeconomic environment, sentiment, and forward outlook for the sector.

sections.title: Drivers of Market Health
sections.description: Analysis of the 7 key drivers affecting industry health: rates, labor, costs, demand, infrastructure, credit, GDP.

sections.title: Public Company Performance
sections.description: Earnings results, revenue/margin analysis, and guidance from 39 tracked public companies.

sections.title: Positioning & EOY Outlook
sections.description: Strategic positioning analysis for different company segments heading into year-end.

sections.title: Trend Continuity & Retrospective
sections.description: Historical trend analysis and comparison with prior periods.

sections.title: How Applied Value Can Help
sections.description: M&A advisory, due diligence, and consulting opportunities identified from market activity.

sections.title: Public Company Snapshot
sections.description: Stock performance, valuation multiples, and analyst sentiment for tracked companies.
